summary: Drag-and-Drop Reordering Feature Testing - ALL TESTS PASSED. Backend: All 3 reorder endpoints (scope-items, additional-costs, deductions) working correctly with proper authentication and validation. Frontend: Verified drag handles (GripVertical icons) present in Project Detail Scope tab (4 handles), Stage Management page (7 handles), and Bulk Scope Entry form (3 handles). Additional/Deduction tabs show 0 handles because no data exists - expected behavior.
critical_code_review_comments: SortableList.jsx properly implements @dnd-kit with data-testid='drag-handle' for testing
All reorder endpoints properly validate empty arrays with 400 status
Authentication is properly enforced on all reorder endpoints

test_credentials.Super Admin: Demo Access -> Quick Access -> Super Admin button (admin@constructionos.com)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Drag-and-drop reordering feature fully tested. Backend endpoints: POST /api/scope-items/reorder (scope_ids), POST /api/additional-costs/reorder (cost_ids), POST /api/deductions/reorder (deduction_ids). Frontend uses @dnd-kit library with SortableList.jsx component. Drag handles have data-testid='drag-handle'. Stage Management at /settings/stages has 7 drag handles. Project Detail Scope tab has drag handles for each scope item. Bulk entry forms also have drag handles.

Backend Reorder Endpoints.POST /api/scope-items/reorder: PASS - Returns 200 with valid scope_ids, 400 for empty array
Backend Reorder Endpoints.POST /api/additional-costs/reorder: PASS - Returns 200 with valid cost_ids, 400 for empty array
Backend Reorder Endpoints.POST /api/deductions/reorder: PASS - Returns 200 with valid deduction_ids, 400 for empty array
Backend Reorder Endpoints.Authentication: PASS - All endpoints return 401/403 for unauthenticated requests

Frontend Drag Handles.Stage Management Page: PASS - 7 drag handles found, 0 ChevronUp/Down icons
Frontend Drag Handles.Bulk Scope Entry Form: PASS - 3 drag handles found in dialog rows
